basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has officially announced the Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official NIT Rourkela website. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a relevant graduate, postgraduate, or engineering degree in Physics, Chemistry, Biotechnology, Biomedical, Chemical, Materials, or Mechanical disciplines, along with the prescribed experience and qualifications, can submit their applications via email until 24-07-2026. The walkin interview is scheduled for 27-07-2026. Dir

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female; 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer)

qualification.education_qualification: Three Years graduate degree in Physics/Chemistry/Biotechnology/biomedical/related field + three Years post qualification experience or PG (MS/MSc) in physics /Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ biomedical/allied field, Engineering in First class Biotechnology/Biomedical/Chemical/Materials/Physics/Mechanical - Four Years Graduate Degree + 3 years of Experience, Btech/MTech in Biotechnology/Biomedical/Chemical/Materials/Physics/Mechanical with GATE/GPAT/NET/any national level exams in relevant disciplines
qualification.details: Three Years graduate degree in Physics/Chemistry/Biotechnology/biomedical/related field + three Years post qualification experience or PG (MS/MSc) in physics /Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ biomedical/allied field OR Engineering in First class Biotechnology/Biomedical/Chemical/Materials/Physics/Mechanical - Four Years Graduate Degree + 3 years of Experience. The candidate should also satisfy the PhD admission eligibility criteria of NIT Rourkela.

salary_details.details: INR 28,000.00 /- per month (Year 1 & 2); INR 29,400.00 /- per month (Year 3)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Project Technical Support III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Rourkela Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Rourkela Project Technical Support (III) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Project Technical Support III Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Three Years graduate degree in Physics/Chemistry/Biotechnology/biomedical/related field + three Years post qualification experience or PG (MS/MSc) in physics /Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ biomedical/allied field OR Engineering in First class Biotechnology/Biomedical/Chemical/Materials/Physics/Mechanical - Four Years Graduate Degree + 3 years of Experience. The candidate should also satisfy the PhD admission eligibility criteria of NIT Rourkela.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female; 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer)

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: INR 28,000.00 /- per month (Year 1 & 2); INR 29,400.00 /- per month (Year 3)

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Rourkela Project Technical Support (III) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Technical Support (III) position at NIT Rourkela is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support (III) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support (III) position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 29,400 per month, depending on the year of service.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the NIT Rourkela Project Technical Support (III) job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete application with all required documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technical Support (III) role at NIT Rourkela will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a three-year graduate degree in Physics/Chemistry/Biotechnology/biomedical/related field with relevant experience, or a PG degree in a similar field, or a four-year graduate degree in engineering with experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Technical Support (III) position is scheduled to be held on 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support (III) at NIT Rourkela.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.
